text.title: Gce Autoscaling Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gce-autoscaling methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: pick-metric
step.action: CPU vs custom-metric vs scheduled — based on workload type.

step.name: configure-policy
step.action: Set min/max replicas, target metric, cool-down period.

step.name: schedules
step.action: Add scaling schedules for known peaks.

step.name: smoke-load
step.action: Drive load; verify scale-out + scale-in behaves as expected.
